title: POST /books creates book with title, author, year, isbn
evidence: src/app.ts:50-57 creates endpoint; src/db.ts:39-50 implements storage

title: GET /books lists books with optional ?author= filter
evidence: src/app.ts:59-63 handles author query param; src/db.ts:52-59 filters by author

title: GET /books/{id} retrieves single book by ID
evidence: src/app.ts:65-75 parses ID and fetches with 404 on missing

title: PUT /books/{id} updates book
evidence: src/app.ts:77-91 validates input and updates with 404 on missing

title: Use TypeScript and Express framework
evidence: src/*.ts uses TypeScript; package.json lists express ^4.21.1 as dependency

title: Store data in SQLite with better-sqlite3
evidence: src/db.ts:1-25 initializes better-sqlite3 database with books table

title: Return JSON responses with appropriate HTTP status codes
evidence: app.ts returns 200, 201, 204, 400, 404, 500 as appropriate per endpoint

title: Input validation requiring title and author
evidence: src/app.ts:4-33 validateBookInput checks title and author are non-empty strings

title: README with setup and run instructions
evidence: README.md includes setup, running, tests, endpoints, examples, and project layout

title: At least 3 unit/integration tests
evidence: tests/books.test.ts has 18 passing tests covering all endpoints and validation

title: Error handling includes JSON body validation
evidence: src/app.ts:105-110 error handler catches malformed JSON and returns 400
